case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. KAYLA BOUTET KUNZE ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KUNZE, KAYLA BOUTET DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-06-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-10-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED SEP-05-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KUNZE, KAYLA BOUTET
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KUNZE, KAYLA BOUTET
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-03-2014 CONTINUED TO FEB-04-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585(D) AND EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $274.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KUNZE, KAYLA BOUTET

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNZE, KAYLA BOUTET $1,689.63 PRINCIPAL, $274.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,963.63, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-04-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
